omitted_declarations.policy_reference: During service use: device information (model, OS version, device identifier, etc.), IP address, location information, access time, and usage logs
Methods of collection: sign-up and consent flows, events/promotions (with separate consent), automatic collection via partner platforms, and information provided during customer support interactions.
During service use: device information (model, OS version, device identifier, etc.), IP address, location information, access time, and usage logs
